title: Smuggler's Log

"'''Smuggler's Log'''" was a series of RPG articles appearing in several issues of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' and introduced several characters in the perspective of [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]].

==Contents==
===''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 1===
The first ''Smuggler's log'' segment appeared in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1]]''. This first issue introduces Platt Okeefe as well as [[Lorana's Labyrinth]], a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] catering for smugglers on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kelada/Legends|Kelada]] situated among the warehouses and docking bays of [[Kelada starport]].{{App
|characters=

===''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2===
This ''Smuggler's log'' segment appeared in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2]]''. This issue focuses on [[Customs official/Legends|Imperial Customs Officers]] and introduces [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Orem Ulum]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hallyn Phlynne]] and Captain [[Gresia Vleen]].{{App

===''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3===
This ''Smuggler's log'' segment appeared in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3]]''. This issue focuses on [[Bulk freighter/Legends|bulk freighter]] uses for smuggling and presents a floor plan of a classic bulk freighter, advantages and problems of smuggling with them, modifications a smuggler may make and the life you will live on one of these ships.{{App

===''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 11===
This ''Smuggler's log'' segment appeared in the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11]]''. In this issue, Okeefe talks about her start in smuggling and introduces the [[Klatooinian Trade Guild/Legends|Klatooinian Trade Guild]] as well as some members including [[Guild Master/Legends|guild boss]] [[Pok Nar-Ten]], his [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] [[Gjeel Dhantra]], [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Kuuvat]] and [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw tech]] [[Nazrita Villache]].{{App
